achievements.title: Mic Test Successful
achievements.description: [see forum] Test your microphone successfully, THIS IS REQUIRED FOR THIS SET. ONLY 'melonDS' CORE WORKS FOR THIS SET.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Mario's Basics
achievements.description: Learn Mario's fighting basics without taking damage from Bowser.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: The Shell Is Back!
achievements.description: Collect all 10 attack pieces in Trash Pit.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: No Replacements Available
achievements.description: Defeat Sea Pipe Statue without allowing it to replace its head.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: It is I who added the nuts to that!
achievements.description: Defeat the fawfulized, rampaging Sea Pipe Statue on the beach.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Fire Away!
achievements.description: Collect all 10 attack pieces in Pump Works.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Operation Rescue Starlow
achievements.description: Defeat Scutlet without harming Starlow.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Firebug Blocking Fire
achievements.description: Defeat Scutlet to help Bowser regain his ability to breath fire.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Goombas On Fire
achievements.description: You finally freed us goombas in Dimble Wood! GOO-RAH!
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Damaging Environment
achievements.description: Defeat Wiggler by only harming their head with environmental attacks.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Enough Deep Breaths!
achievements.description: Defeat Wiggler inside Dimble Wood to retrieve the Banzai Bill.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: No Time To Recover
achievements.description: Defeat Durmite without allowing them to recover life.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: An Unwanted Invader
achievements.description: Defeat the invader that entered Bowser's body, Durmite.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: No Heat Protection
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser's Castle using only fire.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Castle Crasher
achievements.description: Grow up and defeat... Bowser's own castle?
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Glam Kings Full Of Money
achievements.description: Defeat a Lakitu King (Bumpsy Plains) or Glam Lakitu (Blubble Lake) by inhaling them with Bowser.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Blasting Shy Guys
achievements.description: King Bowser finally freed us tired Shy Guys in Bowser Path! SHOO-RAH!
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: A Suspicious Visitor
achievements.description: Talk to a suspicious character inside Fawful Theater.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Coins Are More Important Than Anything Else
achievements.description: Defeat Midbus after earning 50 coins during battle.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: The VIP Always Wins!
achievements.description: Defeat Midbus on-stage inside the Fawful Theater.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Bouncy Attack
achievements.description: Collect all 10 attack pieces in Flab Zone.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Experienced Sock-Finder
achievements.description: Find the "EXP Socks" in a breezy room within Flab Zone, have you tried failing jumps yet?
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Too Many Duplicates
achievements.description: Defeat Keratin without hitting any of the duplicates.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: The Princess Is In Another Body
achievements.description: Defeat Keratin to save Princess Peach in the Flab Zone.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Barrel-Bombardment
achievements.description: Get 10 attack pieces from the Koopa Paratroopa Trio, hey!
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Only One Can Survive
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser without letting both Mario & Luigi hook on Starlow (unless one Bro is defeated).
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: So Long, King Bowser!
achievements.description: Beat Bowser himself as Mario & Luigi.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Playing With The Kids
achievements.description: Play hide-and-seek with the blue Toad kid found next to the badge store in Toad Town.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Freedom for Koopas
achievements.description: Free the captured Koopas in Blubble Lake.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Y-Icky Water
achievements.description: Defeat the Tower of Yikk without pushing it into the water more than twice.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Towering Allergen
achievements.description: Grow large once again to defeat a gigantic Tower of Yikk.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Energetic Bounces
achievements.description: Collect all 10 attack pieces in Energy Hold.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: No Small Wisdom
achievements.description: Defeat Wisdurm without allowing them to become small again.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: A Wise Invader
achievements.description: Win the battle for the first Star Cure against Wisdurm.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Groundbreaking Guardian
achievements.description: Come back and find the "Guardian Socks" in previously unexplored areas of Pump Works.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Brawny Shells
achievements.description: Get the "Brawny Wear" near the west of Blubble Lake in an area only Mario & Luigi can access.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Mushroom Ball Collector
achievements.description: Find all 16 Mushroom Balls in Toad Town. Start the sidequest by talking to the yellow Toad.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Exploding Bob-Ombs
achievements.description: We Bob-Ombs are finally free from being caught in Bowser's Castle! WOO!
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Quick Express
achievements.description: Beat the Fawful Express without reaching the final station.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Brotrayers
achievements.description: Defeat the betraying crew of the Fawful Express.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: 1 On 1 Fight
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser Memory by only attacking the one of the same color as you. Bros. Attacks count as the one that started it.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Forgetful Repulsion Program
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser Memory M & L to get access to Bowser's Memory.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Knocked Out Building
achievements.description: Get the "KO Shell" from a broken down, seemingly abandoned building in Toad Town.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Sprouting Cliffs
achievements.description: Find the "Mushroom Gloves" on a high-up secret area on the Plack Beach Cliffs.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: A Groundbreaking Attack
achievements.description: Collect all 10 attack pieces in Dimble Wood.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Spinning Puzzles
achievements.description: Help out Kuzzle in Plack Beach to get 10 attack pieces.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Full-House For Kuzzle
achievements.description: Find and complete all Jigsaw Puzzles for Kuzzle on Plack Beach.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Giant Poster With A Small Entrance
achievements.description: Light the path and follow the darkness to find the "Giant Shell" in Bowser Path.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Unfortunately Well Preserved Enemies
achievements.description: Open the Preservation Chamber in Bowser's Castle and get the 10 attack pieces inside.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Almighty Doctor
achievements.description: Will you get this Bros. Attack from the Toadley Clinic receptionist? You will.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Hidden Star
achievements.description: Collect all 10 attack pieces in Peach's Castle.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: What's In The Trash Belongs There
achievements.description: Defeat Junker without freeing Luigi.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Trash the Trasher
achievements.description: Defeat Midbus' mad dancing toy, Junker.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: No Time For Tea Time!
achievements.description: Skip the peaceful tea-session in Lumbar Nook by pressing the following in order: A B X Y L R Y X B A
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Magical Magikoopa Mob
achievements.description: You guys, we Magikoopas have finally been saved in Peach's Castle! KOO-RAH!
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Counterattacking.5
achievements.description: Let a regular Dark Mechawful get a new body and then defeat the Dark Mechawful.5 using only counterattacks.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Blitty, ma cherie!
achievements.description: Collect all 15 Blitties and give them to Broque Monsieur to receive a special reward.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Don't Let It Snow
achievements.description: Defeat Blizzard Midbus without inhaling Snawfuls.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: A Frosty Freezing Fight
achievements.description: Defeat the powered up Blizzard Midbus once and for all.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: No Satellmite Left Behind
achievements.description: Defeat the Dark Star while always defeating both Dark Satellmites in one turn.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Expell The Darkness
achievements.description: Defeat the Dark Star to stop it from gaining more abilities.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Furiously Stubborn
achievements.description: Defeat the Castle of Fury without healing.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Another Furious Castle
achievements.description: Defeat the enraged Castle of Fury.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Dark Chimney
achievements.description: Find the "D-Star Wear" in a room in a cozy furnace within Peach's Castle that only Mario & Luigi can access.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Bowser-Only
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Fawful without using the Inhale Block.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: No More Fury!
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Fawful to prevent him from absorbing more power.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Pantless Victory
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss without wearing any equipment (except badges).
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: The Grand Finale
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Energy Hold
achievements.description: Collect all 17 beans in Energy Hold.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Airway
achievements.description: Collect all 8 beans in Airway.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Toad Town
achievements.description: Collect all 29 beans in Toad Town.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Toad Town Caves
achievements.description: Collect all 10 beans in Toad Town Caves.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Blubble Lake
achievements.description: Collect all 21 beans in Blubble Lake.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Plack Beach
achievements.description: Collect all 57 beans in Plack Beach.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Dimble Wood
achievements.description: Collect all 29 beans in Dimble Wood.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Peach's Castle
achievements.description: Collect all 17 beans in Peach's Castle.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Cavi Cape
achievements.description: Collect all 11 beans in Cavi Cape.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Bumpsy Plains
achievements.description: Collect all 4 beans in Bumpsy Plains.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Bowser Path
achievements.description: Collect all 10 beans in Bowser Path.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Harvest Bean: Bowser's Castle
achievements.description: Collect all 38 beans in Bowser's Castle.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: All The Beans
achievements.description: Collect all 251 beans in the entire game.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Shell Bros.
achievements.description: Reach the Shell rank with either Mario or Luigi.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Flower Bros.
achievements.description: Reach the Flower rank with either Mario or Luigi.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Shine Bros.
achievements.description: Reach the Shine rank with either Mario or Luigi.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Star Bros.
achievements.description: Reach the Star rank with either Mario or Luigi.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: ??????? Bros.
achievements.description: Reach the final rank at Lv40 with either Mario or Luigi.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Silver Boss
achievements.description: Reach the Silver Boss rank at Lv10 with Bowser.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Gold Boss
achievements.description: Reach the Gold Boss rank at Lv20 with Bowser.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: ????? Boss
achievements.description: Reach the final rank at Lv40 with Bowser.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Gauntlet Beginner
achievements.description: Clear Class 1 in the Challenge Node Gauntlet.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.description: Clear Class 2 in the Challenge Node Gauntlet.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Gauntlet Amateur
achievements.description: Clear Class 3 in the Challenge Node Gauntlet.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Gauntlet Pro
achievements.description: Clear Class 4 in the Challenge Node Gauntlet.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Gauntlet Expert
achievements.description: Clear Class 5 in the Challenge Node Gauntlet.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Gauntlet Master
achievements.description: Clear Class 6 in the Challenge Node Gauntlet.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Gauntlet Conqueror
achievements.description: Clear Class 7 in the Challenge Node Gauntlet.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Green Shell Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Green Shell inside the Challenge Node.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Yoo Who Cannon Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Yoo Who Cannon inside the Challenge Node.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Super Bouncer Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Super Bouncer inside the Challenge Node.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Spin Pipe Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Spin Pipe inside the Challenge Node.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Magic Window Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Magic Window inside the Challenge Node.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Jump Helmet Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Jump Helmet inside the Challenge Node.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Goomba Storm Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Goomba Storm. Start the minigame by talking to Broque Madame in Blubble Lake.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Koopa Corps Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Koopa Corps. Start the minigame by talking to Broque Madame in Blubble Lake.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Bob-Omb Blitz Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Bob-Omb Blitz. Start the minigame by talking to Broque Madame in Blubble Lake.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Magikoopa Mob Master
achievements.description: Get an A-Rank for Magikoopa Mob. Start the minigame by talking to Broque Madame in Blubble Lake.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Halfway There!
achievements.description: Get 50 points on the 99-Block inside the Challenge Node.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: Lucky!
achievements.description: Get a star on a bonus card to earn a 40% refund.
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN

achievements.title: The End of a Journey
achievements.description: Finish the game with the highest ranks available (reach Lv40 with Mario, Luigi & Bowser).
achievements.author: blueYOSHMIN
